mapper.select: SELECT * FROM borrowing WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT * FROM borrowing
SELECT b.*, bk.title as bookTitle, r.real_name as readerName FROM borrowing b LEFT JOIN book bk ON b.book_id = bk.id LEFT JOIN reader r ON b.reader_id = r.id
SELECT * FROM borrowing WHERE reader_id = #{readerId}
SELECT * FROM borrowing WHERE reader_id = (SELECT id FROM reader WHERE reader_id = #{readerId})
SELECT * FROM borrowing WHERE book_id = #{bookId}
SELECT * FROM borrowing WHERE status = #{status}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO borrowing (reader_id, book_id, borrow_date, due_date, return_date, renew_count, status, fine_amount) VALUES (#{readerId}, #{bookId}, #{borrowDate}, #{dueDate}, #{returnDate}, #{renewCount}, #{status}, #{fineAmount})
mapper.update: UPDATE borrowing SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE borrowing SET return_date = #{returnDate} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrowing WHERE DATE(borrow_date) = CURDATE()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrowing WHERE status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrowing WHERE status = 1 AND due_date < NOW()
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrowing WHERE borrow_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH) GROUP BY YEAR(borrow_date), MONTH(borrow_date) ORDER BY YEAR(borrow_date), MONTH(borrow_date)
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrowing WHERE book_id = #{bookId} AND status = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE borrowing SET fine_amount = 0 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM borrowing WHERE reader_id = #{readerId} AND book_id = #{bookId} AND status = 1 LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM borrowing WHERE status = 1 AND due_date <= DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL #{remindDays} DAY)
SELECT DISTINCT book_id FROM borrowing WHERE reader_id = #{readerId}
SELECT b.category AS category, COUNT(*) AS count FROM borrowing br JOIN book b ON br.book_id = b.id WHERE br.reader_id = #{readerId} GROUP BY b.category ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrowing WHERE reader_id = #{readerId} AND status = 1 AND due_date < NOW()
SELECT * FROM borrowing WHERE reader_id = #{readerId} AND status = 1 AND due_date < NOW()
SELECT * FROM borrowing WHERE reader_id = #{readerId} AND status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM borrowing WHERE reader_id = #{readerId} AND status = #{status}

SELECT b.category AS category, COUNT(*) AS count FROM borrowing br JOIN book b ON br.book_id = b.id WHERE br.borrow_date >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY b.category ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT b.* FROM book b JOIN borrowing br ON b.id = br.book_id GROUP BY b.id ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT br.*, b.title AS book_title, b.category FROM borrowing br JOIN book b ON br.book_id = b.id WHERE br.reader_id = (SELECT id FROM reader WHERE reader_id = #{readerId}) AND br.borrow_date >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) ORDER BY br.borrow_date DESC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(borrow_date, '%Y-%m') AS month, COUNT(*) AS total, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 1 AND due_date < NOW() THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS overdue FROM borrowing WHERE borrow_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(borrow_date, '%Y-%m') ORDER BY month

SELECT r.department AS department, COUNT(*) AS count FROM borrowing br JOIN reader r ON br.reader_id = r.id WHERE r.department IS NOT NULL AND r.department != '' GROUP BY r.department ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT '超时未签到' AS type, s.checkin_time AS time, s.seat_id AS targetId, CONCAT(sa.area, ' ', sa.seat_number) AS targetName FROM seat_checkin s JOIN seat sa ON s.seat_id = sa.id WHERE s.reader_id = #{readerId} AND s.status = 2 UNION ALL SELECT '取消预约' AS type, r.reservation_date AS time, r.id AS targetId, COALESCE(b.title, CONCAT(sa2.area, ' ', sa2.seat_number)) AS targetName FROM reservation r LEFT JOIN book b ON r.book_id = b.id LEFT JOIN seat sa2 ON r.seat_id = sa2.id WHERE r.reader_id = #{readerId} AND r.status = 3 ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 20
